phrases.original: I have been swamped this week.
phrases.translated: Estou atolado de trabalho esta semana.

phrases.original: Could we reschedule for next Tuesday?
phrases.translated: Podemos remarcar para a próxima terça-feira?

phrases.original: I will follow up by email.
phrases.translated: Vou dar um retorno por e-mail.

phrases.original: This is a rough estimate, not a promise.
phrases.translated: Isso é uma estimativa aproximada, não uma promessa.
Deixa eu conferir os números de novo.

phrases.original: A retidão dela é admirada por todos.
phrases.translated: Her righteousness is admired by everyone.

phrases.original: Ele é a peça-chave do projeto.
phrases.translated: He is the linchpin of the project.

phrases.original: Essa ideia absurda não vai funcionar.
phrases.translated: That far-fetched notion won't work.

phrases.original: Ele foi caminhando lentamente pela floresta.
phrases.translated: He was plodding slowly through the forest.
His plight is real.
The rope is teetering.
Conversely
Those ploys are manipulative.
We need to dispel those myths.

phrases.original: Não deixe ninguém influenciar suas decisões.
phrases.translated: Don't let anyone sway your decisions.
That's dandy! You did great.

phrases.original: Já chegamos ao limite do possível.
phrases.translated: We've reached the threshold of possibility.

phrases.original: Ele está exercendo seu trabalho com paixão.
phrases.translated: He's been plying his trade with passion.

phrases.original: Ele ficou muito magro este ano.
phrases.translated: He got really skinny this year.

phrases.original: Me traz um copo de água, por favor.
phrases.translated: Bring me a tumbler of water, please.

phrases.original: É um bom projeto, embora caro.
phrases.translated: It's a good project, albeit expensive.

phrases.original: Qual é sua participação nesse negócio?
phrases.translated: What's your stake in this business?
Muito inteligente / esperto

phrases.original: Existe um provérbio que diz isto.
phrases.translated: There's an adage that says this.
Rips you apart
I was awestruck by the show.
He speaks a lot of lingo.
I despise lies.
O essencial / ir direto ao ponto

phrases.original: A película foi simplificada para crianças.
phrases.translated: The film was dumbed down for kids.

phrases.original: A sociedade está dessensibilizada à violência.
phrases.translated: Society is desensitized to violence.

phrases.original: Essa substância é nociva à saúde.
phrases.translated: That substance is noxious to health.

phrases.original: Ele estava roncando a noite toda.
phrases.translated: He was snoring all night long.

phrases.original: Franzir a testa / expressão de desaprovação
phrases.translated: Frown
Pinnacle
This job entails serious responsibility.
The project was mothballed permanently.
No need to make fanfare about it.
He's prone to accidents.

phrases.original: Aquele vendedor insistente não me deixa em paz.
phrases.translated: That pushy salesman won't leave me alone.
That blown sale cost us dearly.
It behoves you to arrive early.
The beer was too watered-down.
Unbeknownst

phrases.original: A carnificina do acidente foi horrível.
phrases.translated: The carnage from the accident was horrible.
Perfunctory
Your peppiness is contagious!
His upbeatness is inspiring.
He's despising my feelings.
Desajustado / fora do normal
Cootie shot

phrases.original: Ele ficou confuso com as instruções.
phrases.translated: He became discombobulated by the instructions.
She delved deep into the question.
Don't try to undermine my trust.
Your hair looks unkempt today.
Indisciplinado / difícil de controlar
I caught a whiff of deception.

phrases.original: A blusa tem um padrão bordado lindo.
phrases.translated: The blouse has beautiful embroidered stitching.
Sharpie
Rag doll

phrases.original: Ele deu uma mão frouxa ao cumprimento.
phrases.translated: He gave a limp hand at greeting.
He squeezed off the gun quickly.
